page_content:
appropriate learning strategies

REQUIREMENTS The Quantum Science and Engineering minor will consist of 5 courses, totaling 15-16 credits depending on which courses students select. As per university requirements, at least 3 courses (9 credits) must be unique to the minor, permitting 2 courses (6-7 credits) to double count with the students' majors. For each course, students will be able to choose among a list of courses from a course category.
